---
title: 'Resources for Guitar'
date: '2013-03-24T21:18:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tō·dä'''
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '375310798946023272'
blogger_filename: '/2013/03/resources-for-guitar.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tō·dä_/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Outside Material'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
Great series of Lessons on:&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.nextlevelguitar.com/" href="http://www.nextlevelguitar.com/" target="_blank">Next Level Guitar.com</a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
Information on having a&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.plug-inhomerecording.com/" href="http://www.plug-inhomerecording.com/" target="_blank">Home Recording</a></div>
